title: Only tracking threads started in Emails and Activities
excerpt: My team would love the ability for Emails and Activities to only track threads that were started in the app. As it stands Monday tracks all emails sent to addresses that are linked on the item which can be incredibly mes…

posts.author: MaxArceneaux (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: My team would love the ability for Emails and Activities to only track threads that were started in the app. As it stands Monday tracks all emails sent to addresses that are linked on the item which can be incredibly messy when you’ve got the same address across multiple items in a board. Keeping the tracked threads to its related item would greatly increase our likelihood to continue to rely on Monday as our CRM
